meta-description: Learn about tax filing requirements by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Tax filing requirement
excerpt: The minimum amount (or threshold) of income requiring you to file a federal tax return. 2025 filing requirements for most taxpayers: Gross income of at least $15,750 (individuals) or $31,500 (married filing jointly). Different thresholds apply for dependents, people 65 and older, and those who use other tax filing statuses (like married filing separately).
content:
The minimum amount (or threshold) of income requiring you to file a federal tax return. 2025 filing requirements for most taxpayers: Gross income of at least $15,750 (individuals) or $31,500 (married filing jointly). Different thresholds apply for dependents, people 65 and older, and those who use other tax filing statuses (like married filing separately).

Get IRS details on filing requirements for most taxpayers (non-dependents and dependents).

Learn more from the IRS on tax filing status.
